project.name: fb-travel-marketing-bot
project.description_si: Meta/Facebook Marketing API + Next.js + MongoDB use karala travel website ekakata tracking, audience building, Conversions API event sending, custom audience syncing, adset targeting, ad insights analysis saha simple automation karana repo ekak.

how_it_works: Me bot eka audience hoyana magic system ekak nemei. Meeka Meta algorithm ekata hondama signal dena machine ekak.
User kenek package page baluwoth, inquiry start kaloth, WhatsApp click kaloth, booking kaloth ehema events site eken capture wenawa.
E events client side Pixel walin saha server side Conversions API walin Meta ekata yawenawa.
Backend eka e data DB ekata save karala user segments hadanawa: hot, warm, honeymoon, family, luxury, abandoned_lead wage.
Qualified users tika hashed karala Custom Audience walata sync karanawa.
Best users source ekak widihata use karala Lookalike audience hadanna puluwan.
Ad insights pull karala CPA, CTR, CPC, ROAS wage metrics balala bad adsets pause karanawa, honda adsets scale karanawa.
E nisa success eka enne perfect audience kalinma danagena nemei; data gather karala, Meta learn karanna denna, passe winners tika scale karala.
why_it_can_improve_roi: Server side tracking nisa signal loss aduwenawa.
Custom audiences nisa already high-intent users wenama target karanna puluwan.
Lookalikes nisa buy karana ayata samana aya Meta hoyagena deliver karanawa.
Automation nisa budget wastage adu karanna puluwan.
Creative, targeting, optimization, conversion signals okkoma ekathu unaama ROI wadi wenawa.

api_outputs: insights report with spend, clicks, cpc, ctr, leads, purchases
business_outputs: adsets auto-paused or scaled based on thresholds

setup_steps: 1. Meta app ekak create karala Marketing API access token, ad account id, pixel id ganna.
3. Me repo files tika create karanna.
6. npm run dev run karala /api/meta/health check karanna.
7. Travel package pages walin tracking events fire wenawada balanna.
8. /api/meta/sync-audience POST karala test users Custom Audience ekata push karanna.
10. /api/meta/optimize GET run karala thresholds anuwa actions ganna.

repo..env.local:
META_API_VERSION=v23.0
META_ACCESS_TOKEN=YOUR_LONG_LIVED_ACCESS_TOKEN
META_AD_ACCOUNT_ID=act_1234567890
META_PIXEL_ID=1234567890
META_APP_ID=YOUR_APP_ID
META_APP_SECRET=YOUR_APP_SECRET
META_PAGE_ID=
MONGODB_URI=mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/fb_travel_bot
APP_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000
OPTIMIZER_TARGET_CPA=6
OPTIMIZER_MIN_ROAS=2.5
DEFAULT_CURRENCY=USD

ready_api_endpoints.purpose: save event in DB and send Conversions API event
create custom audience and upload hashed users
create campaign, adset, creative and ad
pause weak adsets using simple thresholds

real_targeting_configs.note_si: Interest IDs saha targeting availability account, country, special categories saha Meta policy anuwa wenas wenna puluwan. Me keys ready templates widihata dunnata, run karanna kalin Ads Manager / targeting validation ekin check karanna.

important_notes: Meta tokens, permissions, page id, billing setup nathnam ad creation fail wenna puluwan.
Custom audience upload data hashed format eke yanna one.
Lead, Purchase, Search, ViewContent wage events high-quality widihata send karanna.
No-code certainty 95% guarantee karanna behe; me system eka signal quality saha automation walin ROI improve karanna hadapu foundation ekak.
